meaning: n.再演唱的要求,经要求而再唱int.再演唱一次!vt.要求再演或唱
examples: She played a Chopin waltz as an encore.
Lang's final encore last night was "Barefoot."
We go offstage and come back for the convention of the encore.
The deal finally closed in June 1999, more than a year after Encore was founded.
The updated Shazam Encore and (SHAZAM) RED Apps are currently available for existing Shazamers.
